data.name: PARADISE CLEANING - pregnant ogre -
data.detailed_description:
Paradise Cleaning!- pregnant ogre - is super-casual action game.
All you have to do is just cleaning out all dirty icons by dragging over them within the time limit.
There are 5+1 dirty icons and each of them can be cleaned by the corresponding Cleaning tools.


[CHARACTER]


Name: Izumi
Height: 163cm
Age: secret
Three sizes：B105/W57/H9 6
Hobbies：Drinking, napping, making fun of Kensho
Pet peeve：Bad people


[Features]
・Easy design to play
・20 stages
・20 adult CGs
・11 archivements
・No cleaning, No hentai

data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8.1 / 10 (32bit, 64bit)
  • 處理器: Pentium4 1.3GHz or newer
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
